scope: Develop a terminal-based notepad application using the textual library. The application should feature a TUI with a sidebar listing all notes, a main editor pane for syntax-free text editing, and support for creating, editing, saving, removing notes, as well as keyboard shortcuts for common actions such as opening, closing, and navigating between notes.

tasks.title: Set up project structure and initialize Textual app
tasks.description: Create the main application class that inherits from `App` and set up the initial layout using `ComposeResult`. Define the basic structure of the TUI with a sidebar for listing notes and a main editor pane. Use custom CSS to style the UI elements appropriately.

task_summaries: ✗ task_1: Set up project structure and initialize Textual app (3 iter)
